role: Head of MENA Programme, Swedish Institute of International Affairs
bio: Rouzbeh Parsi is a Swedish-Iranian academic who headed the Middle East and North Africa programme at the Swedish Institute of International Affairs (UI). He was identified as a member of the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023), attending the inaugural meeting at Vienna's Palais Coburg in May 2014 alongside other Western-based Iranian academics recruited by the Iranian [Foreign Ministry](/orgs/ministry-of-foreign-affairs) through [IPIS](/orgs/ipis) to promote Tehran's nuclear negotiating positions in Western policy circles.
